reports.title: Injection in path parameter of Ingress-nginx
reports.summary: A vulnerability was discovered in the Ingress-nginx controller where an attacker could inject arbitrary content into the path parameter of an Ingress. This allowed the attacker to upload a malicious nginx configuration file to the ingress controller's file system and then include that file in a subsequent Ingress. The attacker could then execute arbitrary code on the ingress controller.

reports.title: IDOR to make someone attend or leave an event
reports.summary: An Insecure Direct Object Reference (IDOR) vulnerability was discovered in LinkedIn's event attendance functionality. The vulnerability allowed an attacker to manipulate event attendance by modifying the fsd_profile parameter in POST requests to the voyagerScheduledcontentDashViewerStates API endpoint. This issue has been fixed.

reports.title: Blocking a company page admin prevents him from delete paid media admin or edit his roles
reports.summary: A company page admin was prevented from managing (deleting or editing roles of) a paid media admin when the paid media admin blocked the company page admin. This created an access control vulnerability where administrative privileges were circumvented through the platform's social blocking feature.

reports.title: Missing Access Control in MigrationFile allows attacker to upload files to any Migration
reports.summary: A Missing Authorization vulnerability was identified in GitHub Enterprise Server that allowed unauthorized content to be uploaded to a user's repository migration export due to a missing authorization check in the repository migration upload endpoint. The vulnerability could be exploited by supplying the migration identifier to overwrite or replace a victim's migration archive.

sigmaRules.yamlContent:
title: Potential Code Injection Attack
id: 84de0f98-1096-4c72-90ad-c199845c8597
status: experimental
description: |
  "Potential Code Injection attack detected. Auto-generated from HackerOne report: Injection in path parameter of Ingress-nginx"
  Auto-generated from HackerOne report analysis.
references:
  - https://hackerone.com/reports/2701701
author: Panguard Threat Intel (auto-generated)
date: 2026/03/07
tags:
  - attack.execution
  - attack.t1059
  - cwe.94
logsource:
  category: webserver
detection:
  selection:
    cs-uri-query|contains:
      - 'eval('
      - 'exec('
      - 'system('
      - '__import__'
      - 'Runtime.getRuntime()'
      - 'Process'
      - 'spawn('
      - 'require('
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
  - Legitimate internal API calls
  - Development/testing environments
level: medium

title: Potential Insecure Direct Object Reference
id: d87ab272-1876-441a-88b2-fc7abe9dad40
status: experimental
description: |
  "Potential IDOR attack detected. Auto-generated from HackerOne report: IDOR to make someone attend or leave an event"
  Auto-generated from HackerOne report analysis.
references:
  - https://hackerone.com/reports/1734639
author: Panguard Threat Intel (auto-generated)
date: 2026/03/07
tags:
  - attack.defense_evasion
  - attack.t1078
  - cwe.639
logsource:
  category: webserver
detection:
  selection:
    cs-uri-query|contains:
      - '/users/'
      - '/account/'
      - '/profile/'
      - '/order/'
      - '/api/v'
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
  - Legitimate internal API calls
  - Development/testing environments
level: medium

yaraRules.ruleContent:
rule panguard_code_injection_2701701
{
    meta:
        description = "Detects code injection payloads in files or network captures"
        author = "Panguard Threat Intel (auto-generated)"
        date = "2026-03-07"
        reference = "https://hackerone.com/reports/2701701"
        report_title = "Injection in path parameter of Ingress-nginx"
        confidence = 75
        cwe = "CWE-94"
        mitre = "T1059"

    strings:
        $eval_call = "eval(" nocase
        $exec_call = "exec(" nocase
        $system_call = "system(" nocase
        $spawn_call = "spawn(" nocase
        $runtime_exec = "Runtime.getRuntime()" nocase
        $python_import = "__import__" nocase

    condition:
        2 of them
}
